fatf.name: FATF public statements (black & grey lists)
fatf.note: Updated at each FATF plenary (~Feb / Jun / Oct). Verify before use.

eu_hrtc.name: EU list of high-risk third countries
eu_hrtc.note: Largely mirrors FATF but diverges; check the Official Journal.

cpi.name: Transparency International CPI
cpi.note: CPI 0-100 (100 = clean). Licensed CC BY-ND 4.0 — attribution required.

eu_tax.name: EU list of non-cooperative tax jurisdictions (Annex I / II)
eu_tax.note: Revised twice a year by ECOFIN.

sanctions.name: Country-level sanctions exposure (EU / UN / OFAC programmes)
sanctions.note: Analyst-assigned 0-10 intensity based on breadth/severity of country programmes. SUBJECTIVE — tune to your appetite.

secrecy.name: Financial secrecy / opacity proxy
secrecy.note: Proxy score 0-10. Tax Justice Network FSI is the reference source.

ocindex.name: GI-TOC Global Organized Crime Index
ocindex.note: Criminality, resilience and 15 criminal markets. Attribution required; check download terms.

regulator.name: AML supervisor / FIU (compiled reference)
regulator.note: Supervisor and FIU per jurisdiction. Reference only — verify for operational use.

disclaimer: Verify against primary sources before operational use. Indicators in stale_indicators failed to refresh and retain their previous values.
